message.content:
Create the following Kotlin files for the Android project at D:\llapk. Use the Write tool for each file.

## File 1: D:\llapk\app\src\main\java\com\multilanglearner\ui\theme\Theme.kt

```kotlin
package com.multilanglearner.ui.theme

import android.os.Build
import androidx.compose.foundation.isSystemInDarkTheme
import androidx.compose.material3.*
import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Color
import androidx.compose.ui.unit.sp

// Aurora Dark theme (极光暗色) - from styles.css :root
private val AuroraDarkColors = darkColorScheme(
    primary = Color(0xFFFF6B9D),
    onPrimary = Color.White,
    secondary = Color(0xFFC084FC),
    onSecondary = Color.White,
    tertiary = Color(0xFF60A5FA),
    background = Color(0xFF0A0A1A),
    surface = Color(0xFF1A1030),
    surfaceVariant = Color(0xFF2A1A40),
    onBackground = Color(0xFFE8E0F0),
    onSurface = Color(0xFFE8E0F0),
    onSurfaceVariant = Color(0xFFB0A0C0),
    outline = Color(0xFF4A3A5A),
    error = Color(0xFFF87171),
    primaryContainer = Color(0xFF2A1A40),
    onPrimaryContainer = Color(0xFFFF6B9D)
)

// Song Dynasty aesthetic (宋式美学) - from styles.css [data-theme="song"]
private val SongLightColors = lightColorScheme(
    primary = Color(0xFF8B6914),
    onPrimary = Color.White,
    secondary = Color(0xFFA0522D),
    onSecondary = Color.White,
    tertiary = Color(0xFF6B8E23),
    background = Color(0xFFF5F0E8),
    surface = Color(0xFFFAF6EE),
    surfaceVariant = Color(0xFFEDE5D5),
    onBackground = Color(0xFF3C2415),
    onSurface = Color(0xFF3C2415),
    onSurfaceVariant = Color(0xFF6B5B4B),
    outline = Color(0xFFB8A88A),
    error = Color(0xFFB22222),
    primaryContainer = Color(0xFFF0E6D0),
    onPrimaryContainer = Color(0xFF8B6914)
)

// Font size presets (from styles.css .font-small/medium/large/xlarge)
data class FontSizePreset(
    val subtitle: Int,
    val body: Int,
    val label: Int
)

val FontSizes = mapOf(
    "small" to FontSizePreset(subtitle = 18, body = 13, label = 11),
    "medium" to FontSizePreset(subtitle = 22, body = 14, label = 12),
    "large" to FontSizePreset(subtitle = 28, body = 16, label = 14),
    "xlarge" to FontSizePreset(subtitle = 34, body = 18, label = 16)
)

@Composable
fun MultiLangTheme(
    themeName: String = "aurora",
    content: @Composable () -> Unit
) {
    val colorScheme = when (themeName) {
        "aurora" -> AuroraDarkColors
        "song" -> SongLightColors
        "system" -> if (isSystemInDarkTheme()) AuroraDarkColors else SongLightColors
        else -> AuroraDarkColors
    }

    MaterialTheme(
        colorScheme = colorScheme,
        typography = Typography(),
        content = content
    )
}
```

## File 2: D:\llapk\app\src\main\java\com\multilanglearner\MainApplication.kt

```kotlin
package com.multilanglearner

import android.app.Application
import com.yausername.youtubedl_android.YoutubeDL
import com.yausername.ffmpeg.FFmpeg
import dagger.hilt.android.HiltAndroidApp

@HiltAndroidApp
class MainApplication : Application() {
    override fun onCreate() {
        super.onCreate()
        // Initialize youtubedl-android
        try {
            YoutubeDL.getInstance().init(this)
            FFmpeg.getInstance().init(this)
        } catch (e: Exception) {
            e.printStackTrace()
        }
    }
}
```

## File 3: D:\llapk\app\src\main\java\com\multilanglearner\MainActivity.kt

```kotlin
package com.multilanglearner

import android.os.Bundle
import androidx.activity.ComponentActivity
import androidx.activity.compose.setContent
import androidx.activity.enableEdgeToEdge
import androidx.compose.runtime.collectAsState
import androidx.compose.runtime.getValue
import androidx.hilt.navigation.compose.hiltViewModel
import com.multilanglearner.navigation.NavGraph
import com.multilanglearner.ui.theme.MultiLangTheme
import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint

@AndroidEntryPoint
class MainActivity : ComponentActivity() {
    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
        enableEdgeToEdge()
        setContent {
            val mainViewModel: MainViewModel = hiltViewModel()
            val theme by mainViewModel.theme.collectAsState(initial = "aurora")

            MultiLangTheme(themeName = theme) {
                NavGraph()
            }
        }
    }
}
```

## File 4: D:\llapk\app\src\main\java\com\multilanglearner\MainViewModel.kt

```kotlin
package com.multilanglearner

import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel
import com.multilanglearner.data.store.ThemeStore
import dagger.hilt.android.lifecycle.HiltViewModel
import javax.inject.Inject

@HiltViewModel
class MainViewModel @Inject constructor(
    themeStore: ThemeStore
) : ViewModel() {
    val theme = themeStore.theme
    val fontSize = themeStore.fontSize
}
```

## File 5: D:\llapk\app\src\main\java\com\multilanglearner\navigation\NavGraph.kt

```kotlin
package com.multilanglearner.navigation

import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
import androidx.navigation.NavType
import androidx.navigation.compose.NavHost
import androidx.navigation.compose.composable
import androidx.navigation.compose.rememberNavController
import androidx.navigation.navArgument
import com.multilanglearner.ui.home.HomeScreen
import com.multilanglearner.ui.player.PlayerScreen
import com.multilanglearner.ui.vocabulary.VocabularyScreen
import com.multilanglearner.ui.regulation.RegulationScreen

@Composable
fun NavGraph() {
    val navController = rememberNavController()

    NavHost(navController = navController, startDestination = "home") {
        composable("home") {
            HomeScreen(
                onNavigateToPlayer = { videoPath, subtitlePath ->
                    val encodedVideo = java.net.URLEncoder.encode(videoPath, "UTF-8")
                    val encodedSub = subtitlePath?.let { java.net.URLEncoder.encode(it, "UTF-8") } ?: ""
                    navController.navigate("player/$encodedVideo?subtitle=$encodedSub")
                },
                onNavigateToVocabulary = { navController.navigate("vocabulary") },
                onNavigateToRegulation = { navController.navigate("regulation") }
            )
        }
        composable(
            "player/{videoPath}?subtitle={subtitle}",
            arguments = listOf(
                navArgument("videoPath") { type = NavType.StringType },
                navArgument("subtitle") { type = NavType.StringType; defaultValue = "" }
            )
        ) { backStackEntry ->
            val videoPath = java.net.URLDecoder.decode(backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("videoPath") ?: "", "UTF-8")
            val subtitlePath = java.net.URLDecoder.decode(backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("subtitle") ?: "", "UTF-8").ifBlank { null }
            PlayerScreen(
                videoPath = videoPath,
                subtitlePath = subtitlePath,
                onBack = { navController.popBackStack() }
            )
        }
        composable("vocabulary") {
            VocabularyScreen(onBack = { navController.popBackStack() })
        }
        composable("regulation") {
            RegulationScreen(onBack = { navController.popBackStack() })
        }
    }
}
```

## File 6: D:\llapk\app\src\main\AndroidManifest.xml

```xml
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android">

    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_MEDIA_VIDEO" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE" />

    <application
        android:name=".MainApplication"
        android:allowBackup="true"
        android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher"
        android:label="多语言视频学习"
        android:supportsRtl="true"
        android:theme="@style/Theme.MultiLangLearner"
        android:usesCleartextTraffic="true">

        <activity
            android:name=".MainActivity"
            android:exported="true"
            android:windowSoftInputMode="adjustResize">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" />
            </intent-filter>
        </activity>
    </application>
</manifest>
```

Create all 6 files.

package com.multilanglearner.ui.theme

import android.os.Build
import androidx.compose.foundation.isSystemInDarkTheme
import androidx.compose.material3.*
import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Color
import androidx.compose.ui.unit.sp

// Aurora Dark theme (极光暗色) - from styles.css :root
private val AuroraDarkColors = darkColorScheme(
    primary = Color(0xFFFF6B9D),
    onPrimary = Color.White,
    secondary = Color(0xFFC084FC),
    onSecondary = Color.White,
    tertiary = Color(0xFF60A5FA),
    background = Color(0xFF0A0A1A),
    surface = Color(0xFF1A1030),
    surfaceVariant = Color(0xFF2A1A40),
    onBackground = Color(0xFFE8E0F0),
    onSurface = Color(0xFFE8E0F0),
    onSurfaceVariant = Color(0xFFB0A0C0),
    outline = Color(0xFF4A3A5A),
    error = Color(0xFFF87171),
    primaryContainer = Color(0xFF2A1A40),
    onPrimaryContainer = Color(0xFFFF6B9D)
)

// Song Dynasty aesthetic (宋式美学) - from styles.css [data-theme="song"]
private val SongLightColors = lightColorScheme(
    primary = Color(0xFF8B6914),
    onPrimary = Color.White,
    secondary = Color(0xFFA0522D),
    onSecondary = Color.White,
    tertiary = Color(0xFF6B8E23),
    background = Color(0xFFF5F0E8),

    onBackground = Color(0xFF3C2415),

    outline = Color(0xFFB8A88A),
    error = Color(0xFFB22222),
    primaryContainer = Color(0xFFF0E6D0),
    onPrimaryContainer = Color(0xFF8B6914)
)

// Font size presets (from styles.css .font-small/medium/large/xlarge)
data class FontSizePreset(
    val subtitle: Int,
    val body: Int,
    val label: Int
)

val FontSizes = mapOf(
    "small" to FontSizePreset(subtitle = 18, body = 13, label = 11),
    "medium" to FontSizePreset(subtitle = 22, body = 14, label = 12),
    "large" to FontSizePreset(subtitle = 28, body = 16, label = 14),
    "xlarge" to FontSizePreset(subtitle = 34, body = 18, label = 16)

@Composable
fun MultiLangTheme(
    themeName: String = "aurora",
    content: @Composable () -> Unit

    val colorScheme = when (themeName) {
        "aurora" -> AuroraDarkColors
        "song" -> SongLightColors
        "system" -> if (isSystemInDarkTheme()) AuroraDarkColors else SongLightColors
        else -> AuroraDarkColors

    MaterialTheme(
        colorScheme = colorScheme,
        typography = Typography(),
        content = content

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android">

    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" />

content.text:
全部 6 个文件已成功创建：

1. **`D:\llapk\app\src\main\java\com\multilanglearner\ui\theme\Theme.kt`** -- 主题配置，包含极光暗色和宋式美学两套配色方案，以及字号预设。
2. **`D:\llapk\app\src\main\java\com\multilanglearner\MainApplication.kt`** -- Application 入口，使用 Hilt 依赖注入，初始化 YoutubeDL 和 FFmpeg。
3. **`D:\llapk\app\src\main\java\com\multilanglearner\MainActivity.kt`** -- 主 Activity，启用 EdgeToEdge，通过 MainViewModel 读取主题设置并应用。
4. **`D:\llapk\app\src\main\java\com\multilanglearner\MainViewModel.kt`** -- 主 ViewModel，从 ThemeStore 获取主题和字号配置。
5. **`D:\llapk\app\src\main\java\com\multilanglearner\navigation\NavGraph.kt`** -- 导航图，定义了 home、player、vocabulary、regulation 四个页面路由。
6. **`D:\llapk\app\src\main\AndroidManifest.xml`** -- Android 清单文件，声明权限（网络、存储、前台服务）和 Activity 配置。
